## Summary

-

## Boundary Check

- [ ] No spend, paid API, subscription, payment method, payout, trading, or wallet behavior added.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private repositories, customer data, company data, local files, regulated data, or internal systems added.
- [ ] No public posting, account mutation, supplier execution, external dispatch, or paid compute added.
- [ ] Public-demo claims still avoid production marketplace, payment, customer, and supplier-readiness overclaims.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run gateway:verify`
- [ ] `BEAN_GATEWAY_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run gateway:smoke:hosted`
- [ ] `npm run launch:readiness`
